# Commissioning Stage Subcontractor Coordination: Managing Electrical and HVAC Subcontractor Support During System Integration and Performance Testing

## 适用受众
Subcontractor

## 写作角度说明
调试阶段分包配合要求是电气/HVAC分包商在调试阶段提供技术支持和工作配合的规范要求。调试期间可能出现各种需要分包商响应的技术问题，分包商需要明确响应时效和配合内容，确保调试顺利完成。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Telling the commissioning engineer "call us when you find a problem" — rather than establishing a defined on-call roster and response protocol — means that commissioning delays caused by subcontractor unavailability are never formally attributed to the correct party.

## 参考素材
- On-call roster: designate one qualified electrician and one HVAC technician for commissioning support during normal working hours → provide mobile phone numbers → establish maximum response time (4 hours during working hours, 8 hours outside)
- Commissioning support scope: respond to BMS communication faults → adjust BMS setpoints and parameters → investigate sensor or actuator failures → replace faulty field devices → verify signal integrity at controller
- Work order process: commissioning engineer issues verbal or written request → subcontractor acknowledges within 4 hours → work completed and verified within agreed timeframe → both parties sign work completion record
- Stand-by charges: any commissioning support outside normal working hours → contractor entitled to overtime rates per contract → document stand-by hours with commissioning engineer sign-off
- Resolution documentation: any fault resolved during commissioning → update as-built drawings → update terminal connection records → update BMS configuration logs

## 关键词
Commissioning Support, Subcontractor Coordination, On-Call Support, BMS Configuration, HVAC Integration, Commissioning Response
